programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta final da inicio y los conflictos surgen de inmediato. Mientras algunos se divierten, otros ven cómo sus relaciones llegan a su fin. Poco a poco, todos comienzan a despedirse de la casa, marcando el cierre de unas vacaciones inolvidables.

programme.title: World War Weird

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo y Ángela tienen una noche de pasión y es Félix quien los descubre en la cama, ella confiesa que nunca volvió con su ex. César enfrenta a su verdadero papá y su nueva familia. Martín va en busca de Vicky y la sorprende con una propuesta.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Cuando el amor está a punto de ganar, otra trampa del destino se interpone en las vidas de Lorenzo y Martín para cambiar lo que más desean. Ángela se marcha a Washington dejando una nota de despedida. César toca la gloria en las carreras.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo y Ángela finalmente logran hacer su amor realidad con la bendición de toda la familia. Martín y Vicky borran para siempre de su vida el fantasma de Ernesto y su obsesión maligna. El deseo de cumpleaños de Aurorita es ser la bella durmiente.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Ángela amenaza con desaparecer de la vida de Lorenzo luego de confesarle que sabía todo desde el principio. Lorenzo se siente engañado, en desventaja, y le reclama a sus hijos que no le hayan contado. Vicky insiste en operarse a escondidas.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín descubre que Vicky va a operarse con Elizabeth. Pero Elizabeth cae en manos de la policía mientras intenta intervenir a su próxima víctima. Lorenzo y Ángela no se ponen de acuerdo y ella le echa en cara que fue él quien no la quiso.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo se da la oportunidad de amar como la primera vez a Ángela. Ernesto manipula nuevamente a Vicky amenazando la vida de Martín. Ellos deciden ponerse fuera del alcance de Ernesto. Diego contrata a César para que corra en su escudería.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vicky toma una decisión desesperada cuando ve a Martín en peligro y desconoce que un milagro de la vida está en camino. A Lorenzo le es revelada la verdad sobre su historia de amor y desamor. Gustavo confiesa lo que realmente pasó con Sebastián.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín pierde a Vicky por las amenazas de Ernesto, encerrado en una cárcel de máxima seguridad. Él está dispuesto a vengarse con el bebé en camino. Diana llega al límite de su locura por amor. Blanca se opone a la relación de Lorenzo y Ángela.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer obliga a Renata a llamar a Daniela y decirle que está bien. Ivonne ayuda a Pedro a investigar sobre Edgardo Harrington sin que Ignacio lo sepa. Leonardo trata de demostrarles a todos que dice la verdad con su foto en internet.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Sebastián intenta besar a Paloma, pero Leonardo llega en ese momento. Ella le confiesa que Sebastián es el papá de Cachito. Leonardo y Paloma se reconcilian. Yesenia encuentra una foto de Leonardo en el celular de Ignacio.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pissaladière is Provençal street food, a fragrant, pizza-like tart prized for its contrast of salty black olives and anchovies against a backdrop of sweet caramelized onions and thyme. We figure out how to make a great version of this French classic.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Too often, eggplant Parmesan is a soggy, oily mess. And pasta with chicken and broccoli is heavy and bland. But after many tests in the kitchen, we've come up with recipes that give these simple, honest dishes the respect they deserve.

programme.title: Cook's Country

programme.title: Cook's Country

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia's weekend plans include her favorite cast-iron chicken chilaquiles with homemade hot sauce, refreshing micheladas, and restaurant-inspired fried ice cream cake.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes quinoa burgers with spinach, sun-dried tomatoes, and marinated feta, a sweet and red potato salad, followed by a lightened carrot snack care with yogurt frosting.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia shares her recipe for easy broiled salmon with mustard and crisp dilled crust, orzo salad with cucumber, red onion, and mint, plus a pretty and pink berry fool for dessert

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta all' amatriciana is perhaps Rome's most famous dish. Despite the fancy name, it's nothing more than long-strand pasta sauced with tomatoes, onion, bacon, and hot pepper flakes and dusted with cheese. We show you how to master this simple dish.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Osso buco, literally "bone with a hole," is the Italian term for veal shanks. This meaty cut, akin to beef shanks or lamb shanks, becomes meltingly tender when stewed for several hours in a covered pot. We serve it with a simple and satisfying polenta.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goal was simple: Take French onion soup and baked goat cheese salad and make stellar versions of these bistro favorites.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A sticky bun should be neither dense nor bready, neither saturated with butter nor so sugary that it makes your heart race. The crumb should be tender and feathery and the sticky glaze gently chewy and gooey. Here's how we made ours.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Brownies are too often dull, and blondies (as well as congo bars, their coconut-flavored cousins) can be even worse, since they are even plainer. We decided to keep things simple while focusing on developing superior flavor and texture.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Cakes baked in Bundt and tube pans are popular for a variety of reasons. These pans make cakes that are especially attractive, and the cakes themselves tend to be pretty simple to prepare. In this episode, we make angel food and a chocolate Bundt cake.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop the perfect pumpkin cheesecake recipe, but we never figured it would take 30 cheesecakes to develop a great recipe worthy of the finest holiday dinner.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we take two modern classic desserts —a chocolate volcano cake and caramelized pears—and make them approachable for the home cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our hearty frittata is just as filling as an omelet, but a whole lot easier to prepare and serve. We also uncover the formula for the ideal quiche filling and deliver a tender, buttery pastry crust filled with moist, smooth custard.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we look at a few of our favorite Tex-Mex dishes: tomato salsa, quesadillas, and beef tacos.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen shows you how to make two hearty soups: black bean and tortilla.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more synonymous with fall than butternut squash? In this episode, we explore two main-course squash recipes: a creamy, comforting soup perfect for serving on a busy weeknight and a rich, hearty risotto suitable for entertaining.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome has returned to the present day and is relaxing in her home when Inuyasha comes looking for her. Some of Yura's demonic hair is on his body.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome learns that Inuyasha is a half demon, born of a human mother and a dog demon.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The muonna makes Inuyasha reveal the location of his father's grave.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Nobunaga tries to save the lord of the castle who is possessed by a toad demon.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha goes to save Kagome from Manten. Hiten devours the sacred jewel shard that Manten had and absorbs his demon powers.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome has returned to the present day to take a test. As she does, a noh mask, the Mask of Flesh, begins a violent search for the Shikon Jewel shards.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome sees a Soul Piper, a demon that consoles the spirits of children. She helps Mayu, a girl who is about to become an evil spirit, to pass on.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Half-demon Inuyasha's secret is that he becomes human once a month. That day, Inuyasha and the gang meet Nazuna and stay at a mountain temple.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The ogress, Urasue, robs the grave of Kikyo, the priestess who sealed away Inuyasha fifty years ago.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kikyo is revived when Kagome's soul flows into her. She tries to kill Inuyasha, but Kagome takes back her soul.

programme.desc: Miroku, a womanizing delinquent priest, has been collecting Shikon Jewel shards and steals Kagome's shards.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Naraku appears before Sesshomaru and lends him an arm with a sacred jewel shard embedded in it.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kikyo, who was brought back to life, is living as a priestess.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kikyo paralyzes Kagome. Inuyasha appears before her. Kikyo has been gathering the souls of dead girls.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.desc: Kekoa is devastated when Jessie tells JD that he’s the father of her child. A rescued bodyboarder is paralyzed. Sean has a romantic encounter with a beautiful, woman he thinks might really be Pele, the goddess fire.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Investigating toxic dumping, Sean and Leigh end up chained inside a chamber slowly filling with toxic seawater. Can Sam get them out in time? To raise money, Jason and Zack have to hula dance in grass skirts in front of a lot of women.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Leigh takes over at Baywatch while Sean, Jason, and Zack go to compete in a 12-mile race of natural obstacles. Jessie’s presence at the race creates turmoil. Leigh and Jenna pretend to be lesbian lovers.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: For a rescue, Sean is awarded a free week at Hilton Hawaiian Village, which he declines. Zack pretends he’s Sean and enjoys all the freebies until Sean shows up! A pretty fashion photographer thinks Jason has top model potential.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean has a decision – move to Australia or stay in Hawaii. Zack sees Leigh naked, leading to complications with her fiancé Sam. Kekoa dumps JD and becomes a party girl. When Sam leaves Leigh at the altar, Sean asks Leigh to marry him instead.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig rescues a woman that develops a fatal attraction to him, placing Craig's wife in mortal danger. A fishing trip goes horribly wrong when the boat explodes and Mitch and his mentor Al have to rescue its passengers, including Mitch’s son Hobie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Playing hooky from summer school, Lt. Mitch Buchannon's son Hobie gets dangerously involved with reckless jet skiers.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: During the hottest day of the summer, Craig has to choose between his career as a lawyer and the job he loves being a Baywatch lifeguard. The choice is made when two boys get trapped in a storm drain which is rapidly filling with water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie must come to terms with his past when he confronts a gang of "surf rats" lead by a former friend from his reform school days. Trevor begins to doubt his lifeguarding skill when his girlfriend almost drowns because of his arrogance.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: From the Mohegan Sun Arena, reigning Bellator Lightweight and Featherweight World Champion Patricio Pitbull defends his title against the relentless Emmanuel 'El Matador' Sanchez in a long awaited rematch.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to the Mohegan Sun Arena. Reigning Bellator Heavyweight World Champion and former Bellator Light Heavyweight World Champion Ryan 'Darth' Bader takes on MMA leg-end Lyoto 'The Dragon' Machida in a rematch over eight years in the making.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the Mohegan Sun Arena as newly crowned Bellator MMA Light Heavyweight World Champion Vadim Nemkov puts his belt on the line against Phil 'Mr. Wonderful' Davis in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Bantamweight World Champion Juan 'The Spaniard' Archuleta puts his belt on the line against the Sergio'S.P' Pettis. Also Anthony 'Rumble' Johnson makes his Bellator MMA debut in the Grand Prix as he battles Jose 'Gugu' Augusto.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Women’s Featherweight World Champion Cris Cyborg puts her belt on the line against Leslie 'The Peacemaker' Smith. Former Bantamweight World Champion Darrion 'The Wolf' Caldwell makes his return in a showdown with Leandro 'Alter' Higo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Welterweight World Champion Douglas 'The Phenom' Lima puts his belt on the line against undefeated Ukrainian Yaroslav 'Dynamo' Amo-sov. Legendary knockout artist Paul 'Semtex' Daley collides with Jason 'The Ass Kicking Machine' Jackson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Interim Heavyweight World Champion-ship is up for grabs as Tim Johnson collides with Fedor Team protege Valentin Moldavsky. Also Liz 'Girl-Rilla' Carmouche returns to the Bellator MMA cage to battle undefeated Japanese sensation Kana Watanabe.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: World Champions collide as Juliana Velasquez looks to make the first defense of her Bellator MMA Women’s Flyweight World Championship when she takes on Bellator Kickboxing Flyweight World Champion Denise 'Miss Dynamite' Kielholtz.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Susan emailed Dr. Phil claiming she's at war with her son-in-law, David & daughter, Bekah. Susan is not sure why she's not allowed to see her grandchildren, but claims Bekah blames her "sinful behavior." Can Susan mend things to see her grandkids again?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Four adult siblings say they've been blacklisted by their mother from seeing their dying father, a claim their mother vehemently denies. Emotions run high when this fractured family comes together on Dr. Phil’s stage. Can they put an end to the fighting?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Natalie, 22, says her boyfriend Justin, 25, has an anger problem, and she fears for her life and for their 10-month-old son. Both admit their child has witnessed turmoil. Does this young relationship have a future?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ashley was sexually abused by her father from ages of 5 to 18, locked in a small camper, while giving birth to four of her father's children. In her first national interview since her father's arrest, the 22-year-old mom speaks about her horrible ordeal.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The conversation heated when Dr. Phil gave self-professed bully Temica RoShawn a reality check about her aggressive behavior. Guests Ross & Lyndy say weeks of bullying culminated in their 15-yr-old son being sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amber was the envy of her friends, married, 2 kids, a beautiful home & 6-figure salary as a top-selling real estate agent. When she and her husband divorced, her life spiraled out of control. Dr.Phil examines Amber's fall from grace. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Christina, Jim & daughter Tara. She says she's worried her daughter is in a toxic situation with dad Jim & his 22-year-old new wife who is 20 weeks pregnant. Meet the new wife & find out if Dr. Phil can help this chaotic triangle.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Nancy, who adamantly denies her online love relationship with "Shaun" is a scam. Nancy and her son Darcy speak face-to-face for the first time in over a year. Plus updates from past catfished guests!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you and your beloved say "I do," it's "for better or worse." But what happens when all you feel is the "worse" part and wind up trapped in a bad marriage?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kim & ex-husband, Ryan, are terrified of son, Rylan, 7, who has a fascination with knives, talks to an imaginary friend named "Bleeder", and has sent two teachers to the hospital. What might be causing Rylan's aggressive behavior?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: At 700 lbs., Pauline, 48, has a Guinness World Record title of Heaviest Living Woman. Pauline is also a mother, daughter & friend with hopes and dreams of a better life for herself & her 18-year-old son Dillon. Can Dr. Phil help get her life on track?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lisa says she can't choose between her boyfriend of 1 year or her husband of 26 years. She claims husband Rick is verbally abusive, & controlling. Rick says he will do whatever it takes to keep her from this other man. Whom will Lisa choose?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Monica's old life: English teacher, marathon runner, happy. Now 90 lbs. and no solid food with a C-diff diagnosis, she chains herself to bed to avoid sleepwalking or binge eating. It's a full-time job for mom, Stephanie; friend Breanna suspects enabling.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Courtney who says former friend Amie fabricated several pregnancies and baby deaths. Dr. Phil asks Amie why there are no death records of her deceased children. Why did Amie walk off stage and explosively meltdown backstage? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2014, former live-in nanny Diane Stretton made headlines when she refused to move out of Marcella Bracamonte's home. The women come face-to-face on Dr. Phil's stage. Who's the victim in this mother vs. nanny feud?

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering today's hottest topics like why Cher says she shouldn't be called an icon and the recent opinion piece on tipping that has people debating.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kristina Zias talks nostalgic fashion trends and wedding etiquette with Drew & Ross Mathews. Brendan Fraser's comeback and scientific reasons behind listening to sad songs on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew interviews President Joe Biden and First Lady Jill Biden, discussing their relationship and Christmas traditions. FLOTUS gives a tour of the White House Christmas Decorations.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson is filling in for Drew as co-host for the day! Comedian Ziwe Fumudoh stops by to chat about the new season of her late-night talk show "Ziwe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: A League of Their Own" star Abbi Jacobson opens up about her recent engagement, her bestie Ilana Glazer, what it was like co-creating, writing, producing and starring in "A League of Their Own" and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ralph Macchio opens up to Drew about his new memoir, "Waxing On: The Karate Kid and Me." Plus, Dennis Rodman joins Drew and Ross Mathews at thew news desk to help serve the news sunny-side up!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Champions" director Bobby Farrelly is talking to Drew and joined by cast members Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci and Joshua Felder to chat about the film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: t's Drew-love with Melanie Lynskey and Jason Ritter who are reflecting on their relationship over the years, growing their family and supporting each other through tough times.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Danny Seo is joining the Drew's News desk to cover headlines like the 93-year-old who went viral for her dating do's and don't's and the study that found a lot of Americans only clean once every six months.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew takes the show on the road to join Katy Perry on-site at her Las Vegas residency, PLAY. Then, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, in an all-new Drew Crime, meet 68-year-old Fred and his pet cat Bandit who prevented a home invasion.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: HGTV's Lauren Makk is joining Drew! Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering the week's hottest headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines covering a new middle seat airplane lottery and whether hearing birds can help boost your mood.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Renowned OBGYN Dr. Suzanne Gilberg-Lenz is answering burning questions about sexual health including activities that could affect male fertility.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Icon Martha Stewart and Drew tackle relationship red flags at the news desk and Martha reveals which young star she simply adores.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chef Ronnie Woo is cooking up a storm with co-host Ross Mathews. Then, Drew and Ross discuss some of the latest and greatest headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Office" star Rainn Wilson is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover topics like the surprising reason Kate Winslet has a hard time re-watching herself in "Titanic".

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bronwyn Tarboton is sharing some genius upcycling tips including how to create home décor out of items in your trash.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Long Island Medium" star Theresa Caputo is chatting with Drew about her work as a medium, the show and more. She's also doing a special reading of the studio audience.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Rob Riggle joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover topics like the news of a potential "Dumb and Dumber 3" and the couple that opted for mashed potato powder instead of rice at their wedding.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tamera Mowry Housley opens up about sharing her spicy to-do list with her husband in her new memoir, "You Should Sit Down For This!," the possibility of a "Sister, Sister" reboot and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Dictator Lunches" author Jenny Mollen joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk covering everything from Ashton Kutcher and wife Mila Kunis's no closed-door policy to a mom who went viral for changing her son's name at 18-months.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives" host Guy Fieri is joining Drew to chat and play a game! Dating expert Damona Hoffman is joining Drew, Ross Mathews and his husband Wellington Garciato talk about love and soulmates.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kiera Knightley and Carrie Coon join Drew to talk about their upcoming film, "Boston Strangler."Drew and her co-pilotRoss Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Danny DeVito is playing a round of behind the scenes and sharing tidbits from some of his biggest roles.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: A year ago, actress Dylan Mulvaney publicly came out as a trans woman for the first time and began documenting her transition in her Tik-Tok series "Days of Girlhood," that now has over a billion views.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A con artist pretends to be someone from back home and stays with the Clampetts. She plans to get photos of Jed in a compromising position in order to blackmail him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to sophisticate Emaline, but she has bigger plans for blackmailing Mr. Drysdale with her cuckoo clock camera. The colonel continues to woo Granny. The two swindlers though haven't met someone as sharp as Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is chopping wood while a chimpanzee named May Bell watches. He wishes that he could teach May Bell to chop wood. When Elly May comes by, she and Jethro talk and decide that they want a gorilla.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts miss Herbie and ask Mr. Drysdale to get the tame gorilla back. The banker promises to help, but actually hinders the effort.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's soap making sends noxious smoke into the air, which gets the attention of smog commissioner Tinsley. He shuts down the operation, and Jed decides to run against him when he misunderstands Mr. Drysdale's advice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed takes a job on the board of directors of O.K. Oil Company.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is so desperate to meet a woman that when Miss Hathaway's bird watching group arrives, he goes out of his way to try to impress the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: In order to buy Mrs. Drysdale a special Christmas present, the Clampetts take seasonal jobs in a department store.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny discovers Martians next door at the Drysdale mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny decides to take her share of the Clampett millions and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Granny decide to donate the burden of their millions to some college students and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Crowfoot Indians come to Beverly Hills to discuss a boundary dispute at the Clampett oil field, Granny prepares for war.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro believes his moment for Hollywood stardom has arrived. Casting for Bachelor Sheriff Knows Best is occurring, and Jethro mistakenly thinks he has been chosen.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Valerie tries to pacify Ginger by setting her up with Jonathan. Donna's sorority asks students to go without sex for 24 hours in order to promote abstinence as a means of preventing venereal diseases. Clare bets that Steve cannot make good on his pledge.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Colin visits Kelly and announces that he has kicked his cocaine habit. Kelly gets a roommate, a troubled teenage runaway named Tara. Valerie has the house to herself as Steve and Brandon leave for a ski weekend with Clare, Susan and David.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Susan spend the weekend at her parents' house. Colin and Valerie's new relationship upsets David and Kelly. Joe's older brother Hank comes to town and tries to discourage him from undergoing surgery.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Valerie puts the club up as collateral to bail Colin out of jail. Kelly comes home from rehab and Donna is put off by the frequent phone calls from a lonely Tara. Clare, Susan, Brandon and Steve organize a romantic evening for the Nat and Joan.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Rush dumps Ryan and Austin off on Steve on the same day that he is hosting a fraternity party. Kelly invites Tara to stay with her after she finishes her stint in rehab.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon, Steve, and Joe go on a camping trip with Susan, Clare, and Donna. The girls become jealous when the guys repeatedly ignore them to help some damsels in distress. Tara sabotages Kelly's relationship with Greg.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Colin tries to remain strong as he prepares to turn himself in and begin his prison term. Brandon and Susan lose a five-thousand-dollar lottery ticket, leading to a major argument.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Kelly agrees to help with the search for Colin when Brandon reveals that Nat could fall victim to the bail bondsman through his business ties to Valerie. Donna balks when she and David are asked to produce a music video for Ray.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Steve run into a bit of trouble when their car breaks down. Donna works with David on a video shoot, and the singer isn't the only one that is hard to deal with.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Joan's daughter Lily comes to town to serve as maid of honor, and seduces best man Brandon. David tries to get another video contract after being dropped by MZA. Valerie sees Kenny having lunch with his family.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Kelly helps Jimmy treat a bleeding cut, and panics after getting some blood on her hand. David refuses to tell his father that he has dropped out of school. Brandon and Mark hire a confident young woman as their news anchor.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: David and Mark throw a big party at their house. Clare catches Steve kissing another girl. Valerie comes clean with Brandon about her affair with Kenny.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Kenny orders Valerie to terminate her pregnancy. Steve is miffed when Clare chooses to go to the Halloween concert with egotistical Dick Harrison. Brandon and Tracy spend time together at the club.

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser reunites with an enemy, Krystal has a much-needed talk with her father, and Sky's twerk fashion show includes a surprise that sends Ceaser over the edge.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Free jackets get in the way of Ceaser squashing his beef with Alex, Tokie refuses to accept peace between Tati and Krystal, and Sky plows ahead with Operation Mend Fences.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After mending fences with Puma, Cease makes him a partner at 113th only to have his decision be questioned during his 40th birthday celebration. Bae struggles to keep her marriage together, while Sky confronts her son Des, about his recent behavior.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Walt brings his new girlfriend by the shop, which causes Donna to catch a flashback. Young Bae and Rob face difficulties in their marriage. Sky is at a crossroads with her relationship with Des.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Kit's mom passes away in D.C and the news rocks the shop. Donna and Walt duke it out over Jessica. Puma hires new girl London and Bae thinks he has a shady, ulterior motive.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Puma hires London to cover for Kitty which disrupts the precarious balance in the shop. Tati has a run in with the law and Donna faces a major financial setback. Puma tries to bring a little kumbaya to 113 but no good deed goes unpunished.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In an effort to support Miss Kitty, Ceaser and the crew head down to Memphis, Tennessee so she can reconnect with her mother's roots. Krystal confronts Donna about her behavior during the lock-in. And Walt makes a serious go at standup comedy.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew continues their stay in Memphis to pay their respects to Kitty's mom. London decides to throw a house party to promote the brand down south. Walt prepares to take his relationship with Jessica to the next step.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser has a new opportunity to expand Black Ink but not everyone is happy with the deal, leaving him to question where loyalties lie. Donna plans a girls' night that's full of rowdy surprises. Walt and Jess can't see eye to eye.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: An unexpected drug test has Tati freaking out. Sky announces a huge surprise. Quani makes a decision that shocks Puma. Rok airs out his dirty laundry - literally. And problems with the Brooklyn shop puts Ceaser on a collision course with the police.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser deals with the fallout of his arrest, and what it means for the Brooklyn shop. Alex and Donna try to get their mojo back in the bedroom. Bae confronts a shocking diagnosis. And Sky embarks on a new venture.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Donna brings up people in Brooklyn talking trash about the upcoming Black Ink, which sets Ceaser off on a spiral through the past. Walt tries to make amends with Jessica. Sky embarks on a new business adventure. And Bae receives a welcome surprise.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC va a San José para investigar una serie de asesinatos, García profundiza en su pasado hacker y se reencuentra con su antiguo amor para ayudar al equipo con el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Gibbs, el agente especial EJ Barrett regresa para dirigir la investigación de la muerte de un marinero que puede estar relacionada con una serie de asesinatos relacionados con el puerto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El asesinato de un teniente de la Marina es grabado por una cámara de seguridad del Pentágono; Gibbs revela que la agente Barrett y su equipo se harán cargo de un caso relacionado con un asesino en serie.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el ex compañero de Tony, Danny Price, aparezca como la última víctima del Asesino Puerto a Puerto, éste revisa sus días como detective en Baltimore, incluyendo su primer encuentro con Gibbs.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El bien común
programme.desc: El mundo de Danny se sacude cuando Robert Lewis (Michael Imperioli), de la oficina del Fiscal General, obtiene nuevas pruebas en su contra en el caso de tiroteo en defensa propia del asesino en serie Thomas Wilder.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El precio de la justicia
programme.desc: Danny y Báez están decididos a conseguir justicia para una joven traumatizada que fue rehén, a pesar de su resistencia a presentar cargos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las regals de la mafia
programme.desc: Decididos a hacer justicia por el ataque a Gormley, Danny y Frank buscan la ayuda del detective Anthony Abetemarco, quien tiene vínculos con el barrio donde ocurrió el ataque.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando JJ y Jefe de Sección de Cruz son secuestrados, el UAC se adentra en la época de JJ en el Departamento de Estado para encontrar pistas sobre su desaparición y descubrir una misión secreta que ahora pone sus vidas en peligro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando el BAU investiga varios asesinatos en la zona de Pittsburgh, el equipo busca un par de sudes que trabajan en equipo. Además, García y Morgan comparten sus planes para el día de San Valentín con sus respectivas parejas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/29/2013. With a combination of cultures, New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. Go with Anthony Bourdain as he explores.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/06/2013. Home to chef Rene Redzepi of Noma, Copenhagen is known as the cultural center of Denmark. Anthony Bourdain explores its fantastic food and natural beauty.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/13/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Sicily, where he goes fishing for his supper and sets out to find a home-cooked meal.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/20/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits the Johannesburg Suburb of Hillbrow, where he spends a day with a taxi driver while absorbing the culture and of course, food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/03/2013. Bourdain is in search of Tokyo's dark, extreme, and bizarrely fetishistic underside. It will be surprising, and at times shocking.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/10/2013. Take a look at Detroit’s history with Anthony Bourdain — from the dramatic economic rise and fall to the promising future it holds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/26/15. Anthony Bourdain returns to Korea after 10 years to experience hyper-modern Seoul, and taste Korean fried chicken, vintage army stew and Kimchi.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 6/19/2016. At the height of the Cold War, the CIA recruited a Soviet diplomat with the code name TRIGON to gain valuable intelligence from inside the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 6/26/2016. A Defense Intelligence Agency interrogator and U.S Special Forces work together to find missing Iraqi dictator Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 7/03/2016. The Joint Special Operations Command needed to stop violent AQI leader Abu Musab al-Zarqawi and put an end to his reign of terror.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 7/10/2016. The FBI and Defense Intelligence Agency join forces to catch Ana Montes, a senior DIA analyst who was passing sensitive intelligence to Cuba.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/14/2016. Homeland Security Investigations conducts an elaborate undercover sting operation to stop an illegal arms dealer.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/21/2016. After the Taliban refused to release international aid workers being held hostage in Afghanistan, the CIA, Joint Special Operations Command, and a Taliban double agent race against time to rescue them.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/17/15. Anthony Bourdain explores the island nation of Madagascar, where he visits the capital city of Tana and samples Malagasy cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/31/15. Anthony Bourdain travels to his childhood home state with his brother Chris, where they rekindle memories at the classic roadside joint, Hiram’s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/07/15. Bourdain explores the beauty, culture, and food of Budapest, where he samples goulash, fisherman's soup, blood sausage, and chicken liver.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 09/25/2016. Lisa Ling gains unprecedented access to the Los Angeles County Jail to understand what it takes to manage the country’s busiest jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen being driven backwards on a one-way street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted felon attempts to outrun the deputies, undercover officers conduct a sting in an area known for prostitution, and a domestic dispute between cousins goes too far.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police chase a man running away from his car and a warrant, a driver is just as unlicensed as his vehicle, and a domestic violence call involves two lovers and a hammer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a highspeed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police contact the Fire Department and alert the guests when they spot a motel fire. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspicious man attempts to flee Police on foot and is later arrested for possession. Officers in New Jersey charge a garage owner with receiving stolen property. Officers arrest a man after witnesses report purse snatching.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect on a bike. A vehicle is pulled over and a passenger is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Police are given a classic "I'm holding it for a friend" excuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate trespasser attempts to give the cops the slip, and a frightened man tries to get the attention of deputies but takes the wrong approach.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist leads officers on a high-speed chase, a dead car battery won't stop a man from eluding the police, and a wanted driver fails to avoid an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver’s assortment of containers raises some questions. A man in possession of a stolen truck insists that his friend is the one at fault.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers suspect meth use by a man sleeping in a bus station, a pedestrian's multiple bags of drugs suggest trafficking, and a drunk driver claims she was set up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reverse drug operation, designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics from undercover officers, proves successful for officers in both Tampa, FL and Palm Beach County, FL. Officers are in search of a burglary suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The driver of a stolen car leads police on a winding chase, undercover officers run a prostitution sting, and a woman's domestic disturbance call leads to her own arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A K-9 unit assists on a motorcycle pursuit turned foot chase gone awry. Officers investigate after noticing the garage door to an auto body shop is open. A pursuit involving a stolen vehicle driving on the wrong side of the freeway ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Cops pursue a man skipping bail, an impaired driver is surprisingly cooperative, and officers struggle to remove a violent offender from a crime scene.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is arrested after officers find a loaded gun during a routine search. Two men are detained after suspected of battery. During Mardi Gras officers arrest a man pickpocketing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A daring driver takes officers on a wild ride, a man offers a bizarre excuse for the items found in his car, and a man is arrested after threatening his neighbor with a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A couple leaving a restaurant on their anniversary are killed in the street and their car is stolen. The crime scene is compromised when it rains shortly after the CSIs arrive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two teenage girls run over a deaf man with their car, but they didn't kill him - he was already dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Warrick take the case of a jogger who was killed by a wild animal in the park. It gets complicated when they discover that the jogger had his liver removed after he was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: On the day Grissom has to evaluate his team, a head is found in the trunk of a car. While Gil and Catherine work on the head, Sara and Nick investigate a body in the desert that's missing its head.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is investigating the ongoing murders by a signature killer. The killer has some knowledge of forensics and has left little evidence behind.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and crew are called in after high roller Tony Braun, a known drug addict, is found dead in his house by a gardener.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire CSI team investigates a disappearance at a local university.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates a possible suicide at a high-profile construction site.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the class clown at the local high school is found murdered, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara and Warrick are called in to investigate an abandoned, blood-splattered apartment and Nick and Catherine must examine a dead scuba diver lodged in a tree.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a murder suspect who is caught red-handed, burying the victims, while Catherine and Warrick take on the case of a woman found dead in a hotel spa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Nick investigate the death of a book restorer, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a fatal train crash.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the apparent violent death of a woman found in a sandbox. Their investigation leads them to the underground world of s and m clubs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan a un sospechoso de asesinato al que pillan in fraganti enterrando a las víctimas, mientras Catherine y Warrick se encargan del caso de una mujer encontrada muerta en el spa de un hotel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Nick investigan la muerte de un restaurador de libros mientras Catherine y Sara son llamadas al lugar de un accidente de tren mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Catherine investigan la aparente muerte violenta de una mujer encontrada en un arenero. Su investigación les lleva al mundo clandestino de los clubes de s y m.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan un atraco a un casino durante el cual se disparó a víctimas inocentes, mientras que Catherine y Sara son llamadas a la escena de un asesinato en un lugar remoto del desierto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick se pone al mando por primera vez cuando el equipo investiga el asesinato del estafador, que ha huido con el dinero de unos turistas sólo para ser tiroteado y asesinado en el aparcamiento.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado cuando un famoso empresario inmobiliario aparece muerto en el ascensor de un hotel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara son llamados a la escena del crimen cuando dos víctimas de asesinato aparecen ocultas en las tuberías de una obra en construcción en medio de un campo de alfalfa, mientras Catherine y Nick investigan un ostensible accidente de caza.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La némesis de Grissom, el asesino en serie Paul Millander, reaparece y se cobra una tercera víctima en este apasionante episodio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un secuestrador ordena a Catherine que acompañe a un hombre que debe entregarle un rescate de un millón de dólares o, de lo contrario, matará a la amante del hombre.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investiga el asesinato de un fotógrafo de Las Vegas cuyos restos fueron arrojados a una granja de cadáveres cercana.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine y Sara tienen que investigar la muerte de un jugador de hockey durante un entrenamiento. Warrick y Nick investigan la aparente muerte relacionada con las drogas de un saxofonista en un casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investiga los asesinatos de cuatro monjes que fueron tiroteados a quemarropa mientras cantaban en un templo budista.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un autobús que transportaba 23 pasajeros de Los Ángeles a Las Vegas se estrella a menos de 40 millas de su destino, matando a nueve personas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Jane Galloway está a punto de sufrir un ataque de nervios. Se ha protegido completamente del mundo exterior, pero eso no impide que un acosador en su ático la mate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a woman, the CSIs uncover a meth lab in her apartment and an unscrupulous FBI agent with a secret life of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a murder at a wedding, the clues eventually lead the CSI team to a local strip club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's past comes back to haunt him when Julia has him arrested for murder. The CSI team must investigate to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio deals with ghosts from his past, the team races against time to save Calleigh from a group of dangerous kidnappers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must act quickly to stop a vigilante who has been on a killing spree, targeting Internet predators.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body in a sinkhole leads Horatio and the CSI team to a robbery, while investigating they discover the target holds a shocking secret.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Alexx's son becomes a suspect in a murder, saving him has dire consequences. Horatio and the CSI team must act to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is killed due to a fake 911 call, Horatio must face off with a private investigator who is systematically destroying the team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When someone is determined to take down Horatio and the CSI team, Horatio puts his life on the line in order to save his team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team will stop at nothing to find who shot Horatio, the evidence leads them to some of the most dangerous people in Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When gasoline gets so expensive that Miami’s residents kill for it, the CSIs come face to face with one of the city’s most sadistic crime rings.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the daughter of Delko's therapist is murdered, Horatio and the CSI team must find the killer before Delko's darkest secrets are exposed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A savage double murder in the Everglades pits Horatio and the CSI team against the brute force of Miami's own Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a murder in Miami's hippest fashion boutique, Horatio discovers that Julia's instability has turned her into a ticking bomb.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: Un hombre trata de llevar a través de la frontera una antigua pistola llamada La Mexicana, que se cree que está maldita, mientras su novia lo presiona para que abandone sus costumbres criminales.

programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: The Englishman Who Went Up A Hill But Came Down A Mountain (LAS)
programme.desc: Hugh Grant protagoniza un joven que ofende a todo un pueblo al decir que su montaña es una colina. Pronto se da cuenta de que los excéntricos lugareños, guiados por un ingenioso posadero (Colm Meaney) no se detendrán ante nada para defender su honor.

programme.title: Un Papá para Navidad
programme.desc: Rebeca, una estrella de las redes sociales enfocada en la fama, recibe una sorpresa cuando un desconocido, que dice ser su padre, aparece en Navidad.

programme.title: CAROLINA
programme.desc: Julia Stiles y la ganadora del Oscar Shirley MacLaine protagonizan esta encantadora comedia romántica en la que una joven intenta escapar de su excéntrica familia sureña, y conocer al hombre de sus sueños.

programme.title: En nombre del amor
programme.desc: De Nicholas Sparks, el autor best-seller, llega esta conmovedora historia sobre hasta dónde estamos dispuestos a llegar para mantener viva la esperanza del amor.

programme.title: Verano en Louisiana
programme.desc: La historia de una joven que llega a la mayoría de edad y se enamora de su vecino.

programme.title: Bent: Plan de venganza
programme.desc: En este mordaz thriller policíaco, un policía desacreditado que busca al asesino de su compañero descubre accidentalmente una conspiración gubernamental vinculada al asesinato de una mujer con un coche bomba.

programme.title: Terminator: El exterminador
programme.desc: En 2029, las super-computadoras dominan el planeta y buscan exterminar la raza humana. Para ello, mandan de regreso en el tiempo a un indestructible cyborg con la misión de matar a Sarah Connor, cuyo hijo se convertirá en la esperanza de la humanidad.

programme.title: Terminator 2: juicio final
programme.desc: La máquina no humana que domina la élite del futuro devastado por la guerra despacha un cíborg asesino al pasado para matar a un jovencito porque pronto será el líder de la resistencia en contra de la máquina.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: Inspirada en la experiencia de Oliver Stone, cuenta la historia de Chris Taylor (Charlie Sheen), un joven recluta enviado a Vietnam que presencia las atrocidades de la guerra, muchas perpetradas por aquellos que llama 'camaradas'.

programme.title: Ultimo cuerpo
programme.desc: El asesinato de un travesti despierta en el periodista Heriberto Camargo una sed de verdad. En su investigación, descubre que no es un delito aislado sino parte de una serie de asesinatos brutales de agentes de policía.

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: EL campeón de kickboxing Eric Sloane es paralizado en el ring por el malvado Tong Po. El hermano menor de Eric, Kurt, busca venganza. Kurt aprende Muay-Thai del gurú de la pelea Xian Chow.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Tod@s caen
programme.desc: Tras su éxito en la taquillera pelicula No Manches Frida 2, Omar Chaparro y Martha Higared llegan a la gran pantalla con la divertidísima comedia romántica TODOS CAEN.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: La luz incidente
programme.desc: Una mujer joven que tiene problemas al criar a sus hijas gemelas después de que su marido y su hermano mueren, acepta el cortejo de un pretendiente encantador pero misterioso, mayor que ella.

programme.title: Odio el amor
programme.desc: A teenager loses his hearing after a terrible accident. Shortly after, he falls in love with a foreign girl living in Mexico. He then finds out that being in love makes him hear again.

programme.title: Abre los ojos
programme.desc: César es un casanova exitoso enamorado de la belleza Sophia (Penélope Cruz), pero una ex celosa lo involucra en un accidente que le destruye la cara.

programme.title: Después de Lucía.
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su esposa, Roberto se muda a la Ciudad de México con su hija, Alejandra. Ella se vuelve objeto de acoso cuando surge un video en el cual Alejandra tiene relaciones con un compañero.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet
programme.desc: En esta película de terror, basada en la novela Ciclo del hombre lobo, de Stephen King. Un hombre lobo está aterrorizando a un pequeño pueblo y depende de un niño discapacitado, y su tío para liberar la ciudad.

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: Cujo
programme.desc: Mientrtas Donna y Vic Trenton luchan para salvar tambaleante su matrimonio, su hijo Tad se hace amigo del adorable San Bernardo de 90 kilos de su mecánico.

programme.title: Hellraiser III: El infierno en la tierra
programme.desc: La vida de una ambiciosa reportera de televisión cambia para siempre tras ser testigo de la muerte de un adolescente. En su viaje por descubrir la verdad, encuentra una caja de rompecabezas extraña que revela un mundo demoniaco de placer y dolor.

programme.title: Hellraiser IV: Línea de sangre
programme.desc: En el año 2127 el Doctor Merchant, a bordo de una estación espacial intentará cumplir una misión devisiva: acabar con los cenobitas para cerrar las puertas del infierno para siempre. Esta misión podría ser la confrontación final con Pinhead.

programme.title: Hellraiser: Inferno
programme.desc: Un turbio detective de Los Ángeles se pierde en un mundo de pesadilla del mal cuando resuelve la misteriosa caja-puzle que libera al diabólico demonio, Pinhead.

programme.title: 666: The Child (LAS)
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita en vuelo. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un único sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adoptó pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: El Juego Del Duende
programme.desc: Después de que un grupo de ladrones es enviado a cazar leyendas urbanas, roban el oro de un duende, solo para descubrir que hay que pagar un alto precio.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Héroes fuera de órbita
programme.desc: Casi veinte años después de que se canceló el programa de televisión de culto Galaxy Quest, una especie alienígena pide ayuda al elenco para salvar al universo.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: Evolución
programme.desc: Un recluta de bombero, dos profesores universitarios, y la geek científica enviada por el gobierno, luchan contra un organismo alienígena que ha evolucionado rápidamente desde que llegó a la tierra dentro de un meteorito.

programme.title: Héroes fuera de órbita
programme.desc: Casi veinte años después de que se canceló el programa de televisión de culto Galaxy Quest, una especie alienígena pide ayuda al elenco para salvar al universo.

programme.title: The Champion
programme.desc: Christian es un futbolista talentoso, imprevisible y rebelde. Tras su última "metedura de pata", el presidente de su equipo decide asignarle un tutor personal que le ayude a controlar su temperamento.

programme.title: Pena ajena
programme.desc: Shaun, un surfer talentoso pero desenfocado, encuentra inspiración en la novela de Martin Skinner y deja Orange County para estudiar Arte Creativo en Stanford.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Guns of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Island In The Sky
programme.desc: Set after World War II, John Wayne plays Dooley, a former army pilot flying transport missions, who is forced to crash-land his fuel-starved plane on a frozen lake after it strays from its course.

programme.title: Donovan's Reef
programme.desc: Acclaimed director John Ford and screen legend John Wayne team up for what would be their final collaboration in this boisterous, rowdy South Seas escapade.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: In Stanley Kramer's cinema classic, screen legends Sidney Poitier and Tony Curtis star as two convicts on the run from a Southern work gang who are bound together by an unbreakable iron chain and separated by an unbridled hatred for each other.

programme.title: Paris Blues
programme.desc: Ram (Paul Newman) and Eddie (Sidney Poitier) are two expatriate jazz musicians living in Paris, where their music is celebrated. When they fall in love with two vacationing American girls, they must decide if they should move back to America with them.

programme.title: Island In The Sky
programme.desc: Set after World War II, John Wayne plays Dooley, a former army pilot flying transport missions, who is forced to crash-land his fuel-starved plane on a frozen lake after it strays from its course.

programme.title: Donovan's Reef
programme.desc: Acclaimed director John Ford and screen legend John Wayne team up for what would be their final collaboration in this boisterous, rowdy South Seas escapade.

programme.title: Hud
programme.desc: Hud Bannon (Paul Newman) is the rebellious son of a respectable rancher who’s continually at odds with his aging father. Patricia Neal and Melvyn Douglas co-star, in their Oscar®-winning roles.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer becomes involved in a Hungarian family feud when he spends the weekend with a friend.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
